Step1Desc: Assign the Prosthetic Base Bone. The Avatar Base Bone is auto-detected by default.
Step2Desc: Mapping is performed automatically from the Prosthetic Base Bone. You can optionally override the Avatar Base Bone manually.
ErrorAutoResolveAvatarBaseBone:
Failed to auto-detect Avatar Base Bone.
Check the parent relationship of the Prosthetic Base Bone or enable manual override.
NoMappingMsg:
No bone mapping generated.
Mapping will be performed automatically once the Prosthetic Base Bone is assigned.
ErrorNoBaseBone: Please assign Prosthetic Base Bone. Optionally set Avatar Base Bone manually if needed.
ConfirmRemoveMsg: Are you sure you want to remove generated constraints from the mapped bones?
CompleteMsg: Constraint setup has been applied successfully.
